nation: Mosquito Grizzly Bears Head Lean Man First Nation
one_time_description: Government of Canada settlement claim proceeds recognized as revenue
economic_notes: First Nation has investment in North Battleford Hospitality Limited (Comfort Inn Suites) at 12.08% ownership. Also holds portfolio investment in Avord Towers through Battleford Tribal Council. Three GBEs: MGBHLM TLE Makah Holding Corp, MGBHLMFN Economic Development Company LP, and MGBHLMFN Economic Development Company Ltd.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 - this is a 2023 year-end statement, not 2024. Large one-time settlement claim from Government of Canada of $5,606,796. Prior year (2022) included massive one-time MGBHLM Legacy Trust (1905 Surrender) receipt of $47,200,648 which inflated prior year revenue to $64M and surplus to $12.7M. No entities fully consolidated - only GBE modified equity method used for 3 entities. TLE Trust and Mosquito Legacy Trust excluded from consolidation. Net financial assets turned negative from $2.6M to -$1.9M. Significant increase in deferred revenue from $8.1M to $19.5M largely due to capital project funding. osr calculation may be negative due to large deferred revenue netting; total government transfers estimated as ISC + GoC settlement + Trust funds + CMHC + FNT + FSIN + BATC + SK Government + SITAG = $27,244,391. Restricted cash includes lawyers trust for settlement claims of $5,786,337.
